articles.title: July 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to U
articles.excerpt: July 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date updated to U; EB-3 India to January 01, 2014. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
